_comment: Cursor MCP profile for stack-ops. DELIBERATELY LEANER than .mcp.json (Claude Code). Cursor caps at ~40 tools across ALL servers and drops the overflow SILENTLY, and it has no tool-search/deferral. This profile is 21 tools: github(read-only,repos+pull_requests)=16 + context7=2 + council=3. Do NOT add serena (21) or notion (24) here; either one blows the ceiling. For UI work, swap github out for playwright rather than adding it. See docs/mcp-layer.md.
